title: 3套JK制服搭配🔥附价格参考！甜酷风一网打尽
body_text:
姐妹们！是不是还在纠结JK制服怎么搭才不显土？我花了一周时间整理了3套日常又出圈的搭配，从水手服到西式都覆盖啦～

✅第一套：经典水手服+纯色百褶裙
上衣选择绀色关东襟水手服（约120元），搭配灰色百褶裙（约80元），领结用同色系（15元）。整体清爽乖巧，适合上学或日常出街，配上小白鞋活力满满！

✅第二套：西式制服+格裙+开衫
白色短袖衬衫（约90元）打底，外穿卡其色毛衣开衫（约150元），下身搭配红蓝格纹百褶裙（约100元）。这套温柔又有层次感，秋冬叠穿大衣也好看，配乐福鞋或马丁靴都🉑！

✅第三套：纯色卫衣+格裙+堆堆袜
宽松灰色连帽卫衣（约110元）搭配深蓝格裙（约90元），露出白色堆堆袜（约20元）和帆布鞋。街头休闲风，拍照超上镜，而且完全不挑身材！

💡小tips：领结/领带买绀色或红色最百搭；袜子选白色或黑色中筒袜；发饰可以用蝴蝶结发夹增加细节～

快艾特你的笨蛋闺蜜一起穿JK出街吧！组队拍照直接封神！

pages.title: 三套总览
pages.hook: JK穿搭合集，甜酷日常任你选！
pages.story: 三套JK搭配覆盖水手服、西式和休闲风，每套都标注了单品价格和风格标签，学生党也能轻松入手。
pages.layout_hint: 三套JK穿搭拼图，每套一个小格子，标注风格标签和总价，背景校园绿茵场

pages.title: 水手服搭配
pages.hook: 经典绀色水手服，乖巧学院风！
pages.story: 绀色关东襟水手服搭配灰色百褶裙，领结点缀细节。上衣版型挺括，不显肩宽；裙摆褶皱立体，A字版型显腿长。配白色中筒袜和黑色玛丽珍鞋，清新又减龄。
pages.layout_hint: 全身穿搭照，左侧标注单品价格，右侧特写领结和裙褶，文字标注关键卖点

pages.title: 西式制服搭
pages.hook: 温柔开衫+格裙，叠穿超好看！
pages.story: 白色衬衫打底，卡其色开衫增加层次感，红蓝格纹裙点亮全身。开衫面料柔软不扎人，格裙颜色正、不易皱。配棕色乐福鞋和同色系斜挎包，日系氛围感拉满。
pages.layout_hint: 模特侧身站立，展示开衫和格裙的叠穿效果，右侧用箭头标注层次，背景图书馆书架

pages.title: 卫衣休闲搭
pages.hook: 没想到JK还能这么穿！运动休闲风。
pages.story: 灰色连帽卫衣搭配深蓝格裙，白色堆堆袜露出脚踝。卫衣Oversize版型遮肉显瘦，格裙百褶不炸褶。配白色帆布鞋和双肩包，逛街上课都舒服，拍照姿势随便摆。
pages.layout_hint: 摆拍姿势：模特坐在地上，双腿前伸，展现卫衣和格裙的搭配，地面点缀落叶，文字标注价格

pages.title: 配饰点睛
pages.story: 推荐几个百搭配饰：绀色或红色领结/领带（约20元）、白色中筒袜（15元）、黑色玛丽珍鞋（180元）、蝴蝶结发夹（10元）。这些单品能瞬间提升精致度，且不挑套装。
pages.layout_hint: 俯拍桌面，摆放领结、袜子、发夹和鞋子，用白色手绘圆圈标注重点，背景为木质桌面

pages.title: 场景穿搭
pages.hook: 不同场合该穿哪套？这里帮你选！
pages.story: 上学首选水手服，乖巧不张扬；约会/拍照穿西式开衫格裙，温柔显气质；运动/逛街选卫衣格裙，自在又时尚。每套搭配都在日常可穿范围内，不会太夸张。
pages.layout_hint: 左中右三列拼图，每列对应一个场景，人物剪影+文字说明，背景为街景/教室/公园模糊图

pages.title: 搭配技巧
pages.hook: 100元也能穿出高级感？学会这3点！
pages.story: 1.领结颜色和裙色呼应（如红蓝格裙配红色领结）。2.袜子长度选膝盖下10厘米最显腿长。3.上衣塞进裙子时留一点松量，避免紧绷。还可以用腰带/腰包提高腰线。
pages.layout_hint: 手绘标注线图片，在模特腿部位置画出袜长参考线，衣角处标注松量，背景为纯色清爽色调

pages.title: 总结推荐
pages.hook: 把这篇码住，就足够搞定JK穿搭！
pages.story: 三套加起来总花费约615元（不含鞋），每套都能单穿或混搭。水手服最经典，西式最温柔，卫衣最日常，新手闭眼入不踩雷！还想看更多搭配吗？评论区告诉我你最想配什么上衣！
pages.layout_hint: 总结卡片式：中间放三套JK拼图，下方主题文字+价格总数，底部互动引导“戳我留言”按钮

cover_prompt: Portrait 3:4 vertical. Top 20%: bold Chinese title '3套JK制服搭配🔥附价格参考！甜酷风一网打尽' in white with blue glow, centered. Middle 60%: three dynamic full-body silhouettes of sailor, western cardigan, and hoodie JK styles overlapping, shot from low angle with motion blur and sun flares, models with different hairstyles. Bottom 20%: Chinese text '总价约615元起' in a soft gradient circle with small tag '学生党必备'. Background: school lawn with bright green and clear sky, warm natural light, 5% margin. No dark colors.

image_prompts.prompt: Xiaohongshu poster, vertical 3:4, info-graphic style. Include Chinese text labels, price tags, and titles visible on the image. Showing: 三套总览. Clean layout, professional, readable Chinese text.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Left 55%: full-body front view of a model with shoulder-length hair and round face, wearing navy sailor uniform and gray pleated skirt, standing with hands at sides, soft lighting. Right 45%: two inset circular close-ups of bow tie and skirt pleats. Chinese text on left: '上衣约120元 裙子约80元' in thin font. Right insets have '领结约15元' and '褶皱立体' arrows. Background: pale blue gradient, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Model (long face, high ponytail) standing in three-quarter view, wearing white shirt, beige cardigan, red-blue plaid skirt. Right side: diagonal arrow lines pointing to layers with Chinese labels '内搭衬衫约90', '开衫约150', '格裙约100'. Background: blurred library bookshelves in warm brown wood tone, soft natural light, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Model (square face, double bun) sitting on ground, legs extended forward, wearing gray hoodie and dark blue plaid skirt, white stack socks visible. Ground with scattered autumn leaves. In front, three Chinese price tags: '卫衣约110', '格裙约90', '堆堆袜约20'. Background: blurred park path in soft gray, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Top-down view on light wood table. Items arranged in circle: navy bow tie, white knee socks, hair clip with bow, black Mary Janes. White hand-drawn circles highlight each item with Chinese price labels: '领结约20', '中筒袜约15', '发夹约10', '玛丽珍鞋约180'. Soft natural light, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Three vertical columns: left column with blue tint shows sailor girl silhouette and Chinese text '上学：水手服+黑皮鞋', middle column pink tint shows cardigan silhouette and '约会：开衫+格裙+乐福鞋', right column green tint shows hoodie silhouette and '逛街：卫衣+格裙+帆布鞋'. Each column has blurred scene background (classroom, park, street). 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Close-up on legs and waist of model (short hair, round face). On right leg, dashed line and arrow with Chinese '袜长：膝下10厘米'. On waist, arrow at tucked shirt with '塞衣角留松量'. Near neck, bow tie with '领结呼应格裙'. Background: solid light pink, hand-drawn style lines, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Central card with rounded corners, light lavender gradient. Inside: three small circular thumbnails in a row, each showing a different JK outfit on different models. Below thumbnails, big Chinese text '总花费约615元起' in bold. Bottom of card: a button shape with Chinese text '戳我留言' and heart icon. Background: white with soft shadow, 5% margin.

title: 格局炸裂🤯 JK穿搭公式，显高显瘦一绝！
body_text:
家人们谁懂啊！每次穿JK都被夸，其实选对搭配超简单！今天分享3套我私藏的JK穿搭，显高显瘦又平价，学生党也能轻松get～

经典学院风：白衬衫+绀色百褶裙+红领结，基础款永不出错，整体不超过250。甜酷机车风：灰色短西装+黑百褶裙+马丁靴，又甜又飒，穿上立马腿长两米！复古文艺风：棕色毛衣+格纹裙+小皮鞋，温柔学姐感，配个帆布包超有氛围～

快艾特你的闺蜜一起穿JK出街吧！💫

pages.title: 风格总览
pages.story: 经典学院风、甜酷机车风、复古文艺风，总有一款适合你！
pages.layout_hint: 三套搭配缩略图网格排列，每套标注风格标签，中央大字'JK穿搭合集'

pages.title: 经典学院风
pages.hook: 白衬衫+绀色裙，永不过时！
pages.story: 基础款白衬衫约79，绀色百褶裙约128，搭配红色领结约25，整体不超过250。系上领结超有学生感！
pages.layout_hint: 全身图，模特站立，单品标注价格和名称，旁边放大领结细节

pages.title: 甜酷机车风
pages.hook: 灰色外套+马丁靴，又甜又飒！
pages.story: 灰色短款西装外套约169，黑色百褶裙约99，马丁靴约199，整体约470。外套短款显腿长，马丁靴增高5厘米，拍照超上镜！
pages.layout_hint: 侧面全身图，模特戴贝雷帽，标注单品及价格，右侧箭头标注显高诀窍

pages.title: 复古文艺风
pages.hook: 棕色毛衣+格纹裙，温柔学姐感！
pages.story: 宽松棕色毛衣约159，格纹半身裙约139，小皮鞋约149，搭配白色中筒袜约20，整体约470。毛衣塞进裙子里，再配个帆布包，学院女主的感觉！
pages.layout_hint: 全身正面图，模特手持书，背景图书馆，单品标注及价格，左下角小标签'复古感'

pages.title: 点睛配饰
pages.hook: 领结、中筒袜、小物让搭配升级！
pages.story: 选择与裙子同色系的领结约25，白色蕾丝中筒袜约15，帆布包约89，瞬间提升精致度。小个子建议选短款领结更利落。
pages.layout_hint: 平铺图，展示领结、袜子、包等配件，每个旁边标注价格和名称，背景干净

pages.title: 场景穿搭
pages.hook: 教室、街头、咖啡厅，穿出不同氛围！
pages.story: 学院风适合上课，甜酷风适合逛街，复古风适合下午茶。同一套JK换不同配饰就有新感觉！
pages.layout_hint: 三宫格，每格一个场景，模特在不同背景，配文标签场景

pages.title: 穿搭技巧
pages.hook: 显高5个技巧，小个子必看！
pages.story: ①上衣塞进裙子显腰线②穿与裙子同色系袜子延伸腿长③选短款外套④搭配厚底鞋或马丁靴⑤领结系高一点更精神。亲测有效！
pages.layout_hint: 手绘风格，箭头标注穿搭要点，人物半身图，每个技巧用数字圈注

pages.title: 总结推荐
pages.hook: 你最喜欢哪一套？评论区告诉我！
pages.story: 2026年6月更新的JK穿搭合集，三套总花费约1200左右，性价比超高！不管你是学生党还是上班族，穿JK都能找回青春感。快码住这篇，下次出门直接抄作业！💕
pages.layout_hint: 总结卡片，中央大字'JK穿搭合集'，下方三个小图缩略，最后加互动提问框

cover_prompt: Portrait vertical 3:4, top 20%: large bold Chinese title '格局炸裂🤯 JK穿搭公式' with bright yellow gradient glow, subtitle small '显高显瘦一绝！', centered, white background. Middle 60%: one cute Japanese high school girl in full JK uniform (navy sailor top with white trim, red ribbon, pleated gray skirt) standing on a pastel blue circle, arms crossed, smiling, soft sunlight, dreamy bokeh bubbles, around her floating emojis of sparkles and hearts. Bottom 20%: decorative elements like a pink gradient corner tag with small Chinese text '3套搭配·一周不重样', and a thin stripe pattern. Overall layout: 5% margin, no dark colors, bright and energetic. All Chinese text must be clear and legible.

image_prompts.prompt: Xiaohongshu poster, vertical 3:4, info-graphic style. Include Chinese text labels, price tags, and titles visible on the image. Showing: 风格总览. Clean layout, professional, readable Chinese text.

Portrait vertical 3:4, top 10%: Chinese title '经典学院风' in navy serif font on a white background strip. Middle 50%: left side full-body view of a Japanese schoolgirl (round face, bangs, medium black hair) wearing white dress shirt with red bow tie, navy pleated skirt, black loafers, standing on a light wood floor, soft side lighting; right side column with three product close-ups: white shirt tag '约79', pleated skirt tag '约128', red ribbon detail tag '约25', each with small Chinese text and thin arrow lines from the garment to the tag. Bottom 30%: a rectangular card with light blue background, containing Chinese text '整体不超过250' in bold, and a decorative ruler graphic. 5% margin, no dark shadows.

Portrait vertical 3:4, top 12%: Chinese title '甜酷机车风' in bold silver-gray font on a dark gray gradient? No, must light background: use a soft lavender-to-white gradient instead. Middle 55%: side-view full body of a Japanese schoolgirl (long wavy hair, angled cap on head, sharp jawline) wearing a gray short blazer, black pleated skirt, chunky black combat boots, one hand in pocket, looking over shoulder, background a blurred city street in pastel tones; on the right side a vertical arrow graphic with Chinese text '显高秘诀：短外套+马丁靴', each word highlighted. Bottom 25%: three price tags in a horizontal row: '外套约169', '裙子约99', '靴子约199', each tag rounded corner on a white card, with small star emojis. 5% margin, no dark areas.

Portrait vertical 3:4, top 10%: Chinese title '复古文艺风' in warm brown color, on a soft peach background ribbon. Middle 60%: full frontal view of a Japanese schoolgirl (straight black hair with glasses, soft smile) holding a book against her chest, wearing oversized brown knit sweater, long tartan skirt, brown leather shoes, white mid-calf socks; background is a university library with wooden shelves and soft warm lighting; bottom left corner has a small label graphic with Chinese text '复古感' inside a curved tag. Bottom 25%: three item cards floating: '棕毛衣约159', '格纹裙约139', '小皮鞋约149' with small icons of clothing. 5% margin, all colors warm and pastel.

Portrait vertical 3:4, top 10%: Chinese title '点睛配饰' in cursive pink font on a very light mint background. Middle 65%: flat lay top-down view of three accessories arranged on a white marble surface: a red ribbon bow tie (left) with label '同色系约25', a pair of white lace knee-high socks (center) with label '白蕾丝中筒约15', a canvas tote bag (right) with label '帆布包约89', each item clearly separated with soft shadows, and a light pink grid pattern under them; each item has a small price sticker overlapping. Bottom 20%: a decorative banner with Chinese text '提升精致度' and tiny flower emojis. No people. 5% margin, bright and clean.

Portrait vertical 3:4, top 10%: Chinese title '场景穿搭' in modern sans-serif light blue font on white. Middle 65%: three equal horizontal strips (like a filmstrip) each showing a different mood and girl: top strip '教室' (classroom) – a girl in navy JK with canvas bag studying at a desk; middle strip '街头' (street) – a girl in gray blazer with combat boots walking on a sunny sidewalk; bottom strip '咖啡厅' (cafe) – a girl in brown sweater with tartan skirt holding a drink, soft indoor lighting; each strip has a small Chinese tag '学院风+帆布包', '甜酷风+马丁靴', '复古风+小皮鞋' at the left edge. Bottom 20%: three pastel colored circles with emojis (📖,🛍️,☕) and text '穿出不同氛围'. 5% margin, all backgrounds light and bright.

Portrait vertical 3:4, top 12%: Chinese title '显高5个技巧' in bold playful yellow font on a pale lavender background. Middle 60%: a hand-drawn style half-body illustration of a Japanese schoolgirl (short curly hair, no detailed face, cartoonish) wearing a white shirt and navy skirt; around her body there are five numbered circles (1 to 5) with short Chinese text: tip1 '塞衣角' pointing to waist, tip2 '同色袜子' pointing to legs, tip3 '短外套' pointing to jacket area, tip4 '厚底鞋' near feet, tip5 '高领结' near collar; all text in red or dark blue, lines connecting. Bottom 25%: a banner with Chinese text '亲测有效！✨' and an arrow. 5% margin, no dark colors, soft pastel.

Portrait vertical 3:4, top 15%: large Chinese title 'JK穿搭合集' in gold gradient on a soft coral background, centered. Middle 50%: three small rectangular thumbnails in a horizontal row, each showing a different past JK outfit (left: classic navy sailor, center: gray blazer, right: brown sweater), each thumbnail with a tiny Chinese label '学院风', '甜酷风', '复古风'; below the thumbnails a white card with rounded corners contains Chinese text '总花费约1200' and '推荐：甜酷风最出片' in two lines. Bottom 25%: an interactive question box with dashed border and Chinese text '你最喜欢哪一套？评论区告诉我！' and a small heart icon. 5% margin, bright and cheerful, no dark.
